queries.question: Display chefs and servers fluent in Spanish.
queries.sql:
SELECT Chefs.name
FROM Chefs
WHERE Chefs.language = "Spanish"
UNION
SELECT Servers.name
FROM Servers
WHERE Servers.language = "Spanish"
